spec_match.rationale: Directly demonstrates the canonical CSS drawer use case, contrasting chain and none scroll traps cleanly.

interactive.rationale: Beautiful interactive navigation drawer: features slide animations, button toggles, backdrop close hooks, and live style switches.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Exactly mirrors the parent index side menu drawer blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: Addresses click propagation cleanly via backdrop overlays and uses aria attributes for screen readers.

references.rationale: Properly cites the official ChromeStatus tracking link under see also references.

design_system.rationale: Fits beautifully into the repository design system, showing clean transition translations and custom badges.
